title: Integration-sprint test results
description: Summary at .scrum/test-results.json. Records one TestCategory per test suite run during an Integration Sprint (smoke-test skill) plus the design_completeness category (design-completeness-check skill), and a recomputed overall_status. Writes go exclusively through scripts/scrum/record-test-result.sh; direct edits are blocked by pre-tool-use-scrum-state-guard.sh. Read by completion-gate.sh (integration_sprint exit criterion), append-po-decision.sh (release_decision=go gate), the po-acceptance skill (UAT gate), and the Textual dashboard.

name.description: TestCategory name (e.g. unit, e2e, integration, smoke, browser, design_completeness). Unique within categories; a re-run replaces the same-named entry.

runner_command.description: Command line used to run the suite, or 'none detected' when skipped.

errors.description: Up to 10 failure details for this category.

overall_status.description: Recomputed on every record: any failed category -> failed; else any skipped -> passed_with_skips; else passed. 'running' is the pre-first-record transient.
